title: Dendrophthora leucocarpa
taxonomy: Dendrophthora leucocarpa is classified within the family Santalaceae, a group of plant species commonly known as mistletoes. This classification is based on the plant's parasitic nature, where it derives its nutrients from a host plant. As a member of the family Santalaceae, Dendrophthora leucocarpa is further grouped into the order Santalales. This order consists of plants that have a unique parasitic or hemiparasitic relationship with their host plants. The classification of Dendrophthora leucocarpa provides valuable insight into its evolutionary relationships and ecological adaptations.
